provenance.note: Generated from saved completed-run outputs by build_sanitized_demo_data.py.

queries.expected_false_positives: Big-lab announcements, MCP tutorials, generic 'now live' marketing.
queries.expected_strong_signal: First-person launch/OSS with a repo/docs/product link.
queries.objective: AI-infra primitives (runtimes, MCP, serving, vector/data infra) at a build/launch moment with a link.
queries.query: (agent runtime OR "MCP server" OR orchestration OR "model serving" OR "inference server" OR "vector database" OR "data infrastructure") ("we launched" OR "I launched" OR "we built" OR "I built" OR "open sourced" OR "now live") has:links lang:en -is:retweet

queries.expected_strong_signal: Founder shipping a tool with a repo/demo/docs.
queries.objective: AI-native dev/infra tools at launch/OSS with a link.
queries.query: ("AI coding" OR "code review" OR "AI testing" OR evals OR observability OR devops OR "AI security") ("we launched" OR "I launched" OR "we built" OR "I built" OR "open sourced" OR "public beta") has:links lang:en -is:retweet

queries.expected_false_positives: Aspirational 'looking for design partners', vendor case studies.
queries.expected_strong_signal: First customer / paid pilot / production use.
queries.objective: AI-workflow/vertical products showing earliest customer pull.
queries.query: ("AI agent" OR "vertical AI" OR "AI copilot" OR "workflow automation") ("first customer" OR "design partner" OR "paid pilot" OR "in production" OR "migrated from") lang:en -is:retweet

queries.expected_false_positives: Recruiters, job reposts, generic 'starting something new'.
queries.expected_strong_signal: Named ex-operator/eng starting a company or seeking a cofounder in-scope.
queries.objective: Credible founders transitioning into AI infra/software, incl. stealth.
queries.query: (agent OR "AI infrastructure" OR "AI software" OR "developer tools") ("left my job" OR "starting a company" OR "building in stealth" OR "founding engineer" OR "looking for a cofounder") lang:en -is:retweet

queries.expected_strong_signal: Team building silicon/edge/robotics with a demo or first units.
queries.objective: AI/compute hardware (chips, edge, robotics, DC cooling) with a prototype/launch link.
queries.query: ("AI chip" OR accelerator OR "inference hardware" OR "edge AI" OR robotics OR "data center cooling") ("we built" OR "we launched" OR prototype OR "first units" OR deployed OR pilot) has:links lang:en -is:retweet

queries.expected_strong_signal: Founder launching a B2B product with a site/docs.
queries.objective: Non-AI B2B/enterprise software at launch with a link.
queries.query: ("B2B SaaS" OR "enterprise software" OR "workflow software") ("we launched" OR "I launched" OR "now live" OR "public beta" OR "we built") has:links lang:en -is:retweet -AI -LLM -agent -copilot

queries.expected_strong_signal: First customer / paid pilot / production.
queries.objective: Non-AI B2B software with earliest customer pull.
queries.query: ("B2B SaaS" OR "enterprise software" OR "workflow software") ("first customer" OR "design partner" OR "paid pilot" OR "in production" OR "migrated from") lang:en -is:retweet -AI -LLM -agent -copilot

queries.expected_strong_signal: Repo/docs/product for a dev-infra tool.
queries.objective: Non-AI developer/data infrastructure at launch/OSS/first customer.
queries.query: ("developer tool" OR API OR database OR observability OR devops OR testing OR "data engineering") ("we launched" OR "I launched" OR "open sourced" OR "now live" OR "first customer") has:links lang:en -is:retweet -AI -LLM -agent -copilot

queries.expected_strong_signal: Founder launching a security product with early customers.
queries.objective: Non-AI cybersecurity/compliance products at launch/traction.
queries.query: (cybersecurity OR "identity security" OR "application security" OR "cloud security" OR compliance) ("we launched" OR "I launched" OR "first customer" OR "design partner" OR "in production") lang:en -is:retweet -AI -LLM -agent -copilot

queries.expected_strong_signal: Founder shipping finops software with first customers.
queries.objective: Financial-operations software (AP, treasury, payroll, procurement) with launch/traction.
queries.query: ("accounts payable" OR treasury OR payroll OR procurement OR "expense management" OR "financial operations") ("we launched" OR "first customer" OR "design partner" OR "paid pilot" OR "in production") lang:en -is:retweet -AI -LLM -agent -copilot

queries.expected_strong_signal: Founder with a vertical product and first customers.
queries.objective: Vertical SaaS (health/legal/construction/field-service) with launch/traction.
queries.query: ("vertical SaaS" OR "practice management" OR "field service" OR "construction software" OR "healthcare software" OR "legal software") ("we launched" OR "first customer" OR "design partner" OR "paid pilot" OR "in production") lang:en -is:retweet -AI -LLM -agent -copilot

queries.expected_strong_signal: Founder launching a GTM tool with early customers.
queries.objective: Sales/CS/RevOps software with launch/traction.
queries.query: ("sales software" OR CRM OR "customer support software" OR "customer success" OR "revenue operations") ("we launched" OR "first customer" OR "design partner" OR "in production" OR "migrated from") lang:en -is:retweet -AI -LLM -agent -copilot

queries.expected_strong_signal: Founder shipping industrial software with early customers.
queries.objective: Supply-chain/manufacturing/logistics software with launch/traction.
queries.query: ("supply chain software" OR logistics OR "manufacturing software" OR "warehouse software" OR "industrial software") ("we launched" OR "first customer" OR "design partner" OR "paid pilot" OR "in production") lang:en -is:retweet -AI -LLM -agent -copilot

queries.expected_strong_signal: Team with a working robot/drone and a demo or first units.
queries.objective: Robotics/drones/autonomy teams with a prototype/deployment link.
queries.query: (robot OR robotics OR drone OR autonomous) ("we built" OR "we launched" OR prototype OR "first units" OR deployed OR pilot) has:links lang:en -is:retweet -course -giveaway -discount

queries.expected_strong_signal: Team building silicon/photonics with tapeout or first units.
queries.objective: Semiconductor/photonics/sensor teams with a tapeout/prototype/first-units link.
queries.query: (semiconductor OR chip OR photonics OR sensor OR accelerator OR "edge compute") ("we built" OR "we launched" OR prototype OR taped-out OR "first units" OR pilot) has:links lang:en -is:retweet

queries.expected_strong_signal: Team with a pilot install or purchase order.
queries.objective: Energy/climate hardware with prototype/pilot/first-installation/PO evidence.
queries.query: (battery OR "energy storage" OR solar OR grid OR hydrogen OR geothermal OR "carbon removal") (prototype OR pilot OR "first installation" OR "purchase order" OR "we launched") has:links lang:en -is:retweet

queries.expected_false_positives: Health influencers, supplement brands, consumer wearables marketing.
queries.expected_strong_signal: Team with a clinical pilot or regulatory milestone.
queries.objective: Medical-device/diagnostics teams with prototype/clinical/FDA/first-patient signal.
queries.query: ("medical device" OR diagnostics OR wearable OR surgical OR "health hardware") (prototype OR clinical OR pilot OR FDA OR "we launched" OR "first patient") has:links lang:en -is:retweet

queries.expected_strong_signal: Team with a manufacturing pilot or purchase order.
queries.objective: Advanced-manufacturing/materials teams with prototype/PO/first-customer evidence.
queries.query: ("advanced materials" OR manufacturing OR "additive manufacturing" OR "3D printing" OR factory OR industrial) (prototype OR "first customer" OR "purchase order" OR pilot OR "we launched") has:links lang:en -is:retweet

queries.expected_strong_signal: Team shipping their own device (not a reseller).
queries.objective: Proprietary consumer hardware with launch/preorder/first-units/shipping.
queries.query: ("consumer hardware" OR wearable OR "smart home" OR camera OR "audio device" OR mobility) ("we launched" OR preorder OR "first units" OR shipping OR prototype) has:links lang:en -is:retweet -giveaway -discount -coupon -amazon -affiliate

queries.expected_strong_signal: Named founder starting a company in an in-scope sector.
queries.objective: Cross-sector founder transitions across software/hardware/deep-tech.
queries.query: ("left my job" OR "starting a company" OR "building in stealth" OR "looking for a cofounder" OR "founding engineer") (SaaS OR software OR hardware OR robotics OR climate OR medical OR manufacturing) lang:en -is:retweet
